title: dactylorhiza × guillaumeae
intro: Dactylorhiza × guillaumeae is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Dactylorhiza incarnata, both of which are orchids native to Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and have anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × guillaumeae include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its possible benefits in reducing the severity of colds and flu. Dactylorhiza × guillaumeae is commonly prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, often used in herbal medicine to treat respiratory and immune system-related issues.
